Kadir Has University Faculty of  Journal Vol. XII Issue 1 has been published!

Dear Kadir Has University Members,

Kadir Has University Faculty of Law Journal Vol. XII Issue 1 has been published! You can access the studies in our journal, which is being scanned in ULAKBİM TRDizin, in print, from KHAS Information Center or electronically via Jurix database. You can send your studies for our December 2024 issue to

[email protected]

until the end of October 15, 2024, and visit hfd.khas.edu.tr for detailed information about our journal, our publishing principles and writing rules.

The studies included in our latest issue are as follows:

PUBLIC LAW

Rethinking the Scope of the UN General Assembly’s ‘Emergency Special Sessions’

Acquisitive Prescription: A Philosophical and Economic Assessment

Euthanasia and Pediatric Euthanasia in Legal and Ethical Dimensions

Evaluation of Plato’s Thoughts on the Education of Warriors and Rulers from the Perspective of Her Work “The Republic”

Anthropological Orientations to Human Rights: The Relationship Between Culture and the Concepts of Rights

Drug Courts

Res. Asst. Bilal OSMANOGLU

Authority to Decide on the Unification and Separation of Criminal Proceedings

The Office of Consul in Roman Public Law

Assoc. Prof.. Dr. Duygu ÖZER SARITAŞ

An Assessment on the Application of International Humanitarian Law Rules in Disaster Processes

Assoc. Prof.. Dr. Yeter TABUR – Asst. Assoc. Prof.. Dr. Erdi ŞAFAK

PRIVATE LAW

Determination of Accident within the Scope of the 1999 Montreal Convention in Light of Current Judicial Decisions

Justification of Decisions Made in Legal Procedures within the Scope of Civil Procedure Law

Climate Crisis from the Perspective of Public Law – Private Law Distinction

The Structure of Non-Performing Loan (NPL) Securitisation and Different Types of NPL Securitisation in Practice

Eda ÇANGA BELBER (LL.M Finance)

Evaluation of the Balance of Interests in the Heir’s Request for Official Book Keeping

Effect of Failure to Announce the General Assembly Meeting Call on the Website on the Validity of the General Assembly Decision

The Source of Liability Arising from Base Stations

Res. Asst. Esra GÜLTEKİN

The Concept of “Commission Agent” in the Field of Transportation Business

Dr. Lecturer Member Muhammed NURVERDI

Evaluation of the Reasons Eliminating or Reducing the Legal Liability of the Physician in Light of the Supreme Court Decisions

Assoc. Prof.. Dr. Zeynep ÖZCAN – Attorney Kevser Aycan YILDIZ İNCESÖZ

Related Party Concept and Related Party Disclosures According to IAS 24

Going Up the Ladder Two by Two: The Consequences of Violating Tiered Dispute Resolution Agreements

Prof. Dr. Zeynep Derya TARMAN

Genericization of the Brand and the Effect of the Brand Owner’s Behavior on Genericization

Criticism of the Liability of Social Network Providers for Unlawful Content in Turkish Law Versus the German Social Networking Law (Netzwerkdurchsetzungsgesetz)

Dr. Lecturer Member Cemile TURGUT

Analysis of Disputes Arising from Cash Capital Debt in Trading Companies in Terms of Mediation Requirement (TTK Art. 5/a)

Assoc. Prof.. Dr. Ferah TÜRKOĞLU UTKU

Innovations and Changes Brought by Law No. 7392 in Terms of Timeshare Contracts and Timeshare Rights

Parties to Contracts Containing General Terms and Conditions

ARTICLE (NON-REFEREED)

Prof. Dr. Cemal Bali AKAL
